plan.text:
Build a 3-panel option surface analysis tool using Plotly.js:

1. **API endpoint** — Already done (`/replay/api/surface`), but needs delta computation added server-side
2. **Surface viewer HTML** — Replace Three.js with Plotly.js, 3-panel layout:
   - Panel 1: 3D Price Surface (calls green, puts red, SPX reference)
   - Panel 2: 2D Delta Heatmap (time × strike, color = realized delta)  
   - Panel 3: Synced 2D charts (SPX + selected contract + rolling delta)
3. **Wire up interactivity** — Click heatmap to select contract, time crosshair sync, date picker
4. **Test & restart** — Verify data loads, restart replay-viewer

phases.name: Enhance API endpoint with delta computation
